title: Observe workplace quality assurance procedures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Observe workplace quality assurance procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify basic quality assurance (QA) practices

pcs.text: Identify hazards to quality in work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards to quality in work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards to quality in work area.

pcs.text: Identify critical control points for immediate work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify critical control points for immediate work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify critical control points for immediate work area.

pcs.text: Identify the purpose and elements of the QA system and relate them to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the purpose and elements of the QA system and relate them to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the purpose and elements of the QA system and relate them to workplace requirements.

elements.title: Follow work instructions

pcs.text: Follow work instructions for quality control for work area

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the quality of the product or service as prescribed in work instructions.

pcs.text: Inform supervisor of problems that affect or could potentially affect quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform supervisor of problems that affect or could potentially affect quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform supervisor of problems that affect or could potentially affect quality.

pcs.text: Take action to correct the problem as directed

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take action to correct the problem as directed.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
